ABOUT CATERY

Building a Better Way to Book Catering.

Catery is a marketplace designed to make it easier for customers to discover catering services and easier for vendors to showcase what they offer.

We're creating a simpler experience for everyone involved in planning events.

OUR MISSION

Bringing Catering Into One Place.

Finding catering shouldn't require endless messages and searching across multiple platforms.

Catery helps customers find services more easily while giving catering businesses a dedicated place to showcase their work.

Download the App

WHAT WE STAND FOR

Three Things We Never Compromise On

01

Simplicity

We believe booking and showcasing catering services should be easy.

02

Transparency

Clear information helps customers make better decisions.

03

Built for Egypt

Designed around how catering businesses and customers actually work.

FAQ

Questions? We've Got Answers.

Booking catering shouldn't take three days, five WhatsApps, and ten Instagram DMs. We built Catery to give event planners the clarity they need — and caterers the visibility they deserve.

Is it free to join Catery?

Yes, joining and listing your business on Catery is completely free.

How long does setup take?

Most vendors complete their profile setup in under 5 minutes.

What types of businesses can join?

Any catering business — from home kitchens to full catering companies.

Which cities do you serve?

We currently operate in major Egyptian cities and are expanding.

How do customers find me?

Customers search by date, city, and cuisine. Your profile appears in results.

How do I get started?

Fill in the join form or download the app and create your vendor account.

STILL CURIOUS?

Can't find your answer?

Our team is happy to help.

Contact us →
